v2_branch_status: ACTIVE — accepting new feature submissions once current refactors complete

branch_policy.main: Code freeze. Only critical hotfixes via hotfix/* branches. Minimal scope, no refactoring.
branch_policy.v2: All new features, refactoring, and optimizations. New features accepted after full refactor completion.

refactor.description: Migrating existing modules to v2 data layer and new UI patterns

summary_narrative: The v2 branch is in active development with a healthy merge velocity of ~10.5 PRs/week. The current focus is module-by-module migration to the new v2 data layer (refactor: 43%) alongside new feature development (feat: 33%). 11 unique contributors merged 42 PRs in the last 30 days. Key WIP areas include settings navigation redesign, AI service consolidation, and the file management system Phase 2. Three long-running PRs (terminal, files architecture, backup) represent large design-scope work still in progress.
